name: Taylor Lane Organic Coffee
tagline: USDA Organic, Fair Trade coffee roasted small-batch in Sonoma County since 1993.
seoDescription: Taylor Lane Organic Coffee roasts USDA Organic, Fair Trade beans and runs a cozy cafe at The Barlow in Sebastopol, CA.

hero.heading: Organic coffee, roasted in Sonoma County
hero.subheading: Small-batch USDA Organic and Fair Trade coffee, roasted on a low-emission Loring roaster and poured fresh at our cafe in Sebastopol's Barlow.

highlights: USDA Organic and Fair Trade certified beans
Small-batch roasted on an energy-efficient Loring Smart Roast

about.heading: About Taylor Lane Organic Coffee
body: Taylor Lane Organic Coffee was founded in 1993, when Chris and Terry Martin set out to roast specialty organic coffee in Sonoma County, California. Originally known as Taylor Maid Farms, the company rebranded to Taylor Lane Organic Coffee in 2018 and is now headquartered in Sebastopol.

Every coffee is USDA Organic and Fair Trade certified and roasted in small batches on an energy-efficient Loring Smart Roast, then hand-packaged in recyclable fiber cans. The company offers a rotating selection of single-origin and blended roasts alongside a cafe, espresso bar, tea house, coworking space, and wholesale program at The Barlow market in Sebastopol.

services.title: Small-batch organic coffee
services.description: A rotating selection of USDA Organic, Fair Trade single-origin and blended roasts, hand-packaged in recyclable fiber cans.

services.title: Cafe and espresso bar
services.description: Expertly crafted espresso drinks, pour-overs, and lattes served in a cozy cafe at The Barlow with free Wi-Fi and seating.

services.title: Loose-leaf tea
services.description: A selection of loose-leaf teas available to enjoy in the cafe or to take home.

services.title: Coffee subscription
services.description: A subscription service that delivers Taylor Lane's organic coffee on a recurring schedule.

services.title: Wholesale program
services.description: Wholesale organic coffee supplied to cafes and businesses across Sonoma County and beyond.

services.title: Coworking space
services.description: A coworking area inside the Sebastopol cafe with free Wi-Fi for working, meeting, and lingering over coffee.

items.a: You'll find us at 6790 McKinley Ave Ste 170.
We proudly serve Sebastopol, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at (707) 634-7129 — we're glad to help.
